hub.title: Chidziwitso cha account
hub.description: Yang'anani ma-order, zosungidwa, delivery, ndi mawonekedwe a Vergeo5.
hub.ordersBody: Tsatirani delivery, pickup, ndi payment pa seller aliyense.
hub.recentEmpty: Ma-product omwe muona adzaonekera pano pa device.
hub.addressesBody: Ma-landmark ndi GPS kuti checkout ikhale yofulumira.
hub.helpBody: Malangizo pa ma-order, payment, ndi account.
hub.deviceNote: Zosungidwa ndi recently viewed zimasungidwa pa device iyi. Sizotsekera stock kapena mtengo.

saved.title: Zosungidwa
saved.description: Ma-product omwe munasunga. Alipo pa device iyi.
saved.disclaimer: Kusunga chinthu sikutsekera stock kapena mtengo.
saved.emptyBody: Dinani heart pa product kuti musunge pa device iyi.
saved.loadError: Sitinathe kutenga product. Yesaninso kapena chotsani.
saved.signedOutNote: Mutha kusunga popanda kulowa. Lowani kuti muyang'ane ma-order ndi addresses.

recent.title: Zomwe munaonapo posachedwa
recent.description: Mbiri yaifupi ya ma-product otsegulidwa pa device iyi.
recent.privacyNote: Zimasungidwa mubrowser iyi yokha. Sizimafananizidwa. Mutha kuchotsa nthawi ina iliyonse.
recent.emptyBody: Tsegulani tsamba la product kuti lioneke pano.
